id: Too Good to Say Goodbye Bruno Mars
folderName: Too Good to Say Goodbye Bruno Mars
setting: A park bench at night. Jake is trying to stop Emma from walking away.
lyrics:
I've made mistakes
I could have treated you better
I let you get away
There goes my happily ever after

Tell me why, why can't we try and start again?
This can't be how our story ends
You're more than my girl, you're my best friend
Tell me you remember when
I was your man and you were my girl
It was you and me against the world

Baby, ain't nobody gonna love me like the way you do
And you ain't never gonna find a love like mine
Tell me, what can I do to make it up to you?
'Cause what we got's too good to say goodbye, goodbye

Yeah, I'm still in love with you, darlin'
I know you feel the same
Oh, what's the point of both of us being broken-hearted?
I pray it's never too late

So tell me why, why can't we try and start again?
This can't be how our story ends
You're more than my girl, you're my best friend
Tell me you remember when
I was your man and you were my girl
It was you and me against the world

Baby, ain't nobody gonna love me like the way you do
And you ain't never gonna find a love like mine
Tell me, what can I do to make it up to you?
'Cause what we got's too good to say goodbye, goodbye

Girl, won't you listen?
It's you that I'm missin'
Take my hand, I wanna go, I wanna go
If we're gonna fight this fight for better days
I know we're gonna make it
This is the chance, let's take it

Baby, ain't nobody gonna love me like the way you do
And you ain't never gonna find a love like mine
Tell me, what can I do to make it up to you?
'Cause what we got's too good to say goodbye
Goodbye

lyricsJa.en: I've made mistakes
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は間違いを犯してしまった

lyricsJa.en: I could have treated you better
lyricsJa.ja: もっと君を大切にできたはずなのに

lyricsJa.en: I let you get away
lyricsJa.ja: 君を逃がしてしまった

lyricsJa.en: There goes my happily ever after
lyricsJa.ja: 僕の幸せな結末が消えていく

lyricsJa.en: Tell me why, why can't we try and start again?
lyricsJa.ja: なぜだか教えて、どうしてやり直すことができないの？

lyricsJa.en: This can't be how our story ends
lyricsJa.ja: 僕たちの物語がこんな風に終わるはずがない

lyricsJa.en: You're more than my girl, you're my best friend
lyricsJa.ja: 君はただの恋人じゃない、最高の親友なんだ

lyricsJa.en: Tell me you remember when
lyricsJa.ja: あの頃のことを覚えていると言って

lyricsJa.en: I was your man and you were my girl
lyricsJa.ja: 僕が君の恋人で、君が僕の恋人だった時を

lyricsJa.en: It was you and me against the world
lyricsJa.ja: 二人で世界を相手にしていたあの頃を

lyricsJa.en: Baby, ain't nobody gonna love me like the way you do
lyricsJa.ja: ベイビー、君のように僕を愛してくれる人は他にいない

lyricsJa.en: And you ain't never gonna find a love like mine
lyricsJa.ja: そして君も、僕のような愛を他で見つけることはないよ

lyricsJa.en: Tell me, what can I do to make it up to you?
lyricsJa.ja: 教えて、どうすれば君に償える？

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause what we got's too good to say goodbye, goodbye
lyricsJa.ja: 僕たちの関係は、さよならを言うにはあまりに素敵すぎるから

lyricsJa.en: Yeah, I'm still in love with you, darlin'
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、まだ君を愛しているんだ、ダーリン

lyricsJa.en: I know you feel the same
lyricsJa.ja: 君も同じ気持ちだって分かってる

lyricsJa.en: Oh, what's the point of both of us being broken-hearted?
lyricsJa.ja: 二人とも傷ついたままでいることに、何の意味があるの？

lyricsJa.en: I pray it's never too late
lyricsJa.ja: まだ遅すぎないことを祈っているよ

lyricsJa.en: So tell me why, why can't we try and start again?
lyricsJa.ja: だから教えて、どうしてやり直すことができないの？

lyricsJa.en: This can't be how our story ends
lyricsJa.ja: 僕たちの物語がこんな風に終わるはずがない

lyricsJa.en: You're more than my girl, you're my best friend
lyricsJa.ja: 君はただの恋人じゃない、最高の親友なんだ

lyricsJa.en: Tell me you remember when
lyricsJa.ja: あの頃のことを覚えていると言って

lyricsJa.en: I was your man and you were my girl
lyricsJa.ja: 僕が君の恋人で、君が僕の恋人だった時を

lyricsJa.en: It was you and me against the world
lyricsJa.ja: 二人で世界を相手にしていたあの頃を

lyricsJa.en: Baby, ain't nobody gonna love me like the way you do
lyricsJa.ja: ベイビー、君のように僕を愛してくれる人は他にいない

lyricsJa.en: And you ain't never gonna find a love like mine
lyricsJa.ja: そして君も、僕のような愛を他で見つけることはないよ

lyricsJa.en: Tell me, what can I do to make it up to you?
lyricsJa.ja: 教えて、どうすれば君に償える？

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause what we got's too good to say goodbye, goodbye
lyricsJa.ja: 僕たちの関係は、さよならを言うにはあまりに素敵すぎるから

lyricsJa.en: Girl, won't you listen?
lyricsJa.ja: ねえ、聞いてくれるかい？

lyricsJa.en: It's you that I'm missin'
lyricsJa.ja: 僕が恋しくてたまらないのは君なんだ

lyricsJa.en: Take my hand, I wanna go, I wanna go
lyricsJa.ja: 僕の手を取って、一緒に行きたいんだ

lyricsJa.en: If we're gonna fight this fight for better days
lyricsJa.ja: より良い日々のために闘うのなら

lyricsJa.en: I know we're gonna make it
lyricsJa.ja: 僕たちならきっとうまくいく

lyricsJa.en: This is the chance, let's take it
lyricsJa.ja: これがチャンスだ、掴み取ろう

lyricsJa.en: Baby, ain't nobody gonna love me like the way you do
lyricsJa.ja: ベイビー、君のように僕を愛してくれる人は他にいない

lyricsJa.en: And you ain't never gonna find a love like mine
lyricsJa.ja: そして君も、僕のような愛を他で見つけることはないよ

lyricsJa.en: Tell me, what can I do to make it up to you?
lyricsJa.ja: 教えて、どうすれば君に償える？

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause what we got's too good to say goodbye
lyricsJa.ja: だって、二人の関係はサヨナラするにはあまりに惜しいから

lyricsJa.en: Goodbye
lyricsJa.ja: サヨナラ

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.japanese: エマ、待って。まだ行かないでくれ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Jake, I've been thinking, and I think it's better if we just...
sentences.displayHtml: Jake, I've been thinking, and I think it's better if we just...

conversation.japanese: ジェイク、ずっと考えてたけど、もう前に進んだほうがいいと思う。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I could have treated you better.
sentences.displayHtml: I could have treated you better.

conversation.japanese: 俺が間違えてたのはわかってる。もっと大切にできたはずだった。今はそれがわかる。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I don't know if this can work anymore.
sentences.displayHtml: I don't know if this can work anymore.

conversation.japanese: それだけじゃないの。もうこれがうまくいくかどうか、わからなくて。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: But this can't be how our story ends.
sentences.displayHtml: But this can't be how our story ends.

sentences.text: You're more than my girl, you're my best friend.
sentences.displayHtml: You're more than my girl, you're my best friend.

conversation.japanese: でも、こんな終わり方でいいはずがない。君は彼女っていうより、一番の親友なんだよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: That's what makes this so hard.
sentences.displayHtml: That's what makes this so hard.

conversation.japanese: わかってる。だからこそ、つらいんじゃない。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Emma, ain't nobody gonna love me like the way you do.
sentences.displayHtml: Emma, ain't nobody gonna love me like the way you do.

sentences.text: And I know I can't love anyone the way I love you.
sentences.displayHtml: And I know I can't love anyone the way I love you.

sentences.text: What we got's too good to say goodbye.
sentences.displayHtml: What we got's too good to say goodbye.

conversation.japanese: エマ、君みたいに俺を愛してくれる人、他に誰もいない。俺だって君以上に好きになれる人はいない。こんなに大切なものを、さよならの一言で終わらせたくない。

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.japanese: 恋しいのは君だけなんだ。毎日ずっと。手をつないでくれ。一緒に乗り越えよう。
